sources.notes: FDSNWS earthquake event query bounded to the Greek landmass/Aegean bbox. Returns recent events with magnitude, depth, time and location. Pan-European; use bbox params to scope to Greece.

sources.authority: Meteoalarm (via Hellenic National Meteorological Service EMY)
sources.notes: Meteoalarm pan-European severe-weather warning feed for Greece, sourced from the Hellenic National Meteorological Service (EMY). Covers wind, rain, snow, heat, thunderstorm and other meteorological hazards with color-coded alert levels.

sources.authority: Hellenic Centre for Marine Research (HCMR) — POSEIDON system
sources.notes: POSEIDON operational marine/meteo forecasting system: wave (MED/WW3/WAM), hydrodynamic (POM) and weather forecasts for the Greek seas and Mediterranean. Daily 5-day updates. Underlying model data served via the POSEIDON THREDDS LAS catalog.

sources.authority: Hellenic Centre for Marine Research (HCMR) — POSEIDON LAS
sources.notes: POSEIDON THREDDS/LAS catalog exposing NetCDF model output (METEO, WW3, WAM, POM, ERSEM) for the Mediterranean/Aegean/Ionian. Machine-readable OPeNDAP/THREDDS endpoints for gridded marine forecasts.

Active incidents (energá symvánta) page listing ongoing fire and emergency events across Greece, including wildfire incidents with location and status. Public HTML page; widely scraped for real-time fire monitoring.

sources.authority: National Observatory of Athens — BEYOND Centre (FireHub)
sources.notes: NOA/BEYOND FireHub: satellite-based (Meteosat SEVIRI, VIIRS, MODIS, Sentinel-2) near-real-time wildfire detection and monitoring for Greece, updated every 5 minutes, plus diachronic burnt-scar mapping. Web-GIS application (FireHub) is the live portal.
